title: Locale
description: Locale file for Vauchi. Each file is a flat object mapping dot-notation keys to translated strings, with a _meta object.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale code (e.g. en, de, fr-CH)

name.description: Locale name in its own language

is_rtl.description: Whether this locale uses right-to-left text direction

^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*\\.[a-z][a-z0-9_.]*$.description: Translated string value (must not be empty)
